name: Termii
description: Termii — African messaging API platform for SMS, voice, and in-app notifications across 200+ countries.

seo.title: Termii — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Termii: Termii — African messaging API platform for SMS, voice, and in-app notifications across 200+ countries.

when_to_use: African SMS OTP for fintech authentication across continent
Voice OTP as SMS fallback in low-signal markets
Bulk SMS campaigns for African e-commerce platforms
In-app notification API for African mobile developers

pros: SMS, voice OTP, WhatsApp and in-app in one API
Competitive pricing for regional OTP traffic
cons: Global coverage less deep than Twilio/Infobip
Platform still maturing vs largest CPaaS
Support quality varies on lower tiers
review.verdict: One of the better developer-first messaging APIs for African markets, especially for fintech OTP flows.
review.best_for: African fintechs and SaaS sending OTPs and WhatsApp across the continent
review.not_for: Teams with no Africa exposure or needing premium global CPaaS features
